title: Mine-Web Swords [CIT]
description: Adds 3 swords for 3 minecraft websites:  CurseForge, Modrinth, Planet Minecraft with CIT
body:
Adds 3 swords for 3 minecraft websites: 
Ancient but effective forge - CurseForge
Promising and modern - Modrinth
Time-tested for a long time - Planet Minecraft

Rename(Swords):

CurseForge - Forge Sword

Modrinth - Modrinth Sword

Planet Minecraft - Planet Sword


The pack is in development and animation is planned to be added in the future, if you want to help with the creation or report bugs and give ideas for improvement, write to my discord jenaton123

REQUIRES OPTIFINE OR CIT RESEWN
